headline: Assessing Caterpillar's Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And A Popular Overvaluation Narrative
summary: What Caterpillar’s Recent Returns Signal for Investors Caterpillar (CAT) has drawn fresh attention after a mixed stretch in the stock, with a 3.6% decline over the past day and roughly 9.5% over the past week, alongside a 6.2% slide over the past month. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. Looking beyond the recent pullback, Caterpillar’s 90-day share price return of 14.56%, year to date share price return of 13.78%, and very large 5-year total shareholder return of 223.56% suggest longer...

headline: 2 Long Term Favorite Stocks Trading Near 52-Week Highs
summary: When stocks are cruising near all-time or 52-week highs, it reflects considerable bullishness with trends where buyers are in control. That's precisely been the case with both Caterpillar and Walmart, both of which have seen new growth avenues open up.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains As Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Complete;' Pharma Stock Dives (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index came off lows on the stock market today. Oil prices surged on the U.S.-Iran war. Nvidia outperformed and Hims popped.
